title: BorderPack
description: Datapack on the gradual increase of the barrier
body:
![Border Pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bcea183765a3ed5e256fa74c65aed9fdff7349a2.png)
### Descriotion
This datapack (with default settings) sets the initial size of the barrier to 500 blocks in each direction, after which it adds 25 blocks every 3 hours

In order for the datapack to work, you need to upload it to the world/server and input the command:

`/function minecraft:border/border_create`

Information on how you can change the parameters of changing the barrier can be found on the [Wiki](https://github.com/MusiJVR/BorderPack/wiki/BorderPack-Wiki)

You can find the source code on my [GitHub](https://github.com/MusiJVR/BorderPack) or you can join my [Discord](https://discord.gg/xY8WJt7VGr)
